nodes.label: Layout Stability Convention
nodes.rationale: Board arena and control dock must never shift pixels between game phases (betting/playing/settled). Achieved via invisible+pointer-events-none instead of conditional mount, and fixed-height wrappers. Prevents janky UX from DOM reflow.

nodes.label: Engine Purity Convention
nodes.rationale: games/<name>/engine.ts must be pure functions with zero React imports and zero side effects. All randomness lives in the engine so components are purely presentational and engines are easily testable.

nodes.label: Tailwind JIT Dynamic Class Warning
nodes.source_location: Non-obvious conventions § Tailwind JIT + data objects
nodes.rationale: Tailwind JIT only scans .tsx/.ts at build time; dynamic class names from data arrays silently produce no styles. Colors from data must use inline style with hex strings.

nodes.label: onResolve Bankroll Contract
nodes.rationale: Page owns all bankroll math; game components never read/write bankroll store directly, only call onResolve({outcome, betAmount, payout, multiplier}). Keeps state ownership clear and prevents double-writes.

nodes.label: Dev Mode / Navbar Dev Tools
nodes.rationale: Dev mode unlocked by password 'geek'; exposes cursed/blessed toggles, force-tie, show-all-games, infinite bets, bankroll/sparks setters, grant/clear upgrades. Not production balance.

nodes.label: Balance Red Flags and EV Outliers
Board Arena Layout Stability Rule
nodes.rationale: Game board content must not shift between phases. Fixed-height slots with invisible+pointer-events-none instead of conditional rendering prevents layout reflow and CLS.

nodes.label: Control Zone Layout Rule
nodes.rationale: Three fixed DOM rows in control dock: chip strip (invisible outside betting), info strip (h-10, swaps content), adaptive action button. Never conditionally render height-bearing elements in control zone.

nodes.label: Curse Mechanic (loseGame / useCurse)
nodes.rationale: Every engine exports loseGame(); every component wires useCurse(). Swap must be invisible to player — same animation/message/timing. Allows dev mode to force losses for testing.

nodes.label: Bless Mechanic (winGame / useBless)
nodes.rationale: Every engine exports winGame(); priority order: blessed→cursed→normal. Blessed overrides curse. Gives variety — not hardcoded minimum win; respects player held state.

nodes.label: Design Color Palette
nodes.rationale: Standardized zinc-950/900 backgrounds, emerald for wins, red for losses, yellow for selection highlights, white CTA buttons. Consistency across all 18 game components.

nodes.label: Tech Stack (Next.js, Zustand, Radix, Framer Motion, Supabase, Prisma)
Case Battles Control Dock UI Fragment
Roulette Board and Control Dock UI Fragment
Slots Board and Control Dock UI Fragment
Street Cups Control Dock UI Fragment
Floored App Icon (F letter, green on dark)
Crash Zone Perk (Crash game)
nodes.rationale: Old: showed ±% visual band around crash point. New design (mega prompt B1): early crash protection — push if crash below per-level threshold and player has not cashed out.

nodes.label: Weighted Edge Perk (Coin Flip)
nodes.rationale: Biases coin win probability. Old levels 58-75%; nerfed in mega prompt B4 to 54-65% to reduce degenerate max-streak EV.

nodes.label: Hole Card Reader Perk (Blackjack)
nodes.rationale: Reveals dealer hole card. In current code all 5 levels have identical effect. Mega prompt B3 adds cumulative level scaling: L2 reveals before bet, L3 refunds on dealer BJ, L4 removes double-down restriction, L5 pays 3× on natural.
